_publications._publicationTitle: Combined CDK4/6 and ERK1/2 Inhibition Enhances Antitumor Activity in NF1-Associated Plexiform Neurofibroma.

_contextSnippet: Additional kinases known to promote tumorigenesis and demonstrating activation in murine PNF compared to control included Colony Stimulating Factor 1 Receptor (CSF1R)
details: Successfully detected Colony Stimulating Factor 1 Receptor (CSF1R) showing activation in murine PNF compared to control
